THREE TRAINS DAILY
ON THE n. P. TO


C0EUR D'ALENE

pages.raw_text:
There is a persistent rumor today
that the Northern Pacific has planned
to enter into an active and aggressive
competition with the Occur d'Alene
& Spokane electric line for the pass
enger business to Lake Occur d'Alene.
1t is claimed that numbered among
the plans Of the company for this
competition is the putting on of three
daily trains each way to and from
the lake with 50-cent fare. The
present rate by the electric line is 60
cents each way


Adding Equipment.

on the Occur d'Alene & Spokane cleo
trio line every day In baIlasting the
roadbed. This work will be continued
until the road is one of the finest bal
lasted in this section, which will
